Hero.title: Transform passing customers into loyal ones.
Hero.subtitle: Feedly replaces the paper loyalty card with an interactive digital experience: QR code, rewards, and promotional games.

Problem.point4: Hard to stand out from competitors.

Solution.title: A new generation of customer loyalty
Solution.card1Text: QR code scanning and instant point additions at checkout.
Solution.card2Text: Spin the wheel, scratch cards to engage your customers.
Solution.card3Text: Track your stats and customer engagement easily.

HowItWorks.title: How it works
HowItWorks.step1: Customer scans QR code to access digital loyalty card.
HowItWorks.step2: During a real purchase, staff scans to add points.
HowItWorks.step3: Customer can use promotional coins to play mini-games.
HowItWorks.step5: Coupons are used during a real purchase.

FinalCTA.title: Schedule a Call With Our Experts
FinalCTA.text: Book a meeting slot to discover how Feedly fits your business needs.

Footer.description: Digital loyalty and engagement platform for physical businesses.

ScheduleModal.title: Schedule a call
ScheduleModal.name: Full name
